If you have any questions/suggestions or find any glitches, please email me at harrismowbray@yahoo.com. If you are interested in discussing gaming with table game inventors and casino mathematicians, join my website's Discord server!

Click for site information

The goal of my website is to teach players the rules and strategies of various casino games, as well as to help train casino dealers into learning the correct rules and payouts.

None of these games were invented by me, most of them belong to their creators including American Gaming Systems, Casino Gaming Development, Dakota Duel Draw LLC, Galaxy Gaming, Houseway Gaming, and Masque Publishing. A few of the games on this website like Blackjack and Cee-lo have existed for centuries and are not owned by anyone.

I would like to extend my sincere gratitude to the creator of Table Games Online, who helped me a lot with my website development in terms of advice and inspiration, as well as to Vegas Aces for their invaluable support and useful information about the casino industry.

Finally, I would not be interested in casino mathematics without the incredibly helpful Wizard of Odds, and my website's design was greatly aided by members of the related Wizard of Vegas forum.

Thanks for reading and have a great day!
